offer: For small medical clinics processing 5–15 invoices/month, disorganized billing records cause cash flow gaps. We organize and digitize records instead of manual record keeping and spreadsheets.
problem: disorganized billing records leading to cash flow gaps
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for medical billing help
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to small clinics with demo video
Share insights in community forums for medical clinics
try_it: Let users try manual entry and digital storage for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminders for billing tasks
Allow CSV import for existing records
